policy: The fork version mirrors the upstream ponder version EXACTLY: @subsquid/ponder@X.Y.Z is built from ponder@X.Y.Z + the Portal layer (portal/). The bin stays `ponder`, so it's a drop-in. We publish a fork release only for ponder versions a client actually needs; `compat.tested` records which versions the seam is proven against (past + future awareness).
seam: HistoricalSync.syncBlockRangeData / syncBlockData (interval-scoped) — identical in shape across the tested range

versions.note: current latest; the layer + wiring were authored against this
Euler (the company) pins this; seam verified identical 0.15.17→0.16.6. Generate the wiring patch + run sync-upstream to promote to verified.

compat.seamStableRange: 0.15.17 - 0.16.6 (verified identical by inspection; CI matrix promotes to 'tested' as patches land)
compat.howToAdd: see PUBLISHING.md — scripts/sync-upstream.sh <ver> --test, then add the row here
